scripts.build: rimraf out/* && npm run build:server && npm run build:http
scripts.start:detached: DEBUG=*:ERROR,*:INFO NODE_ENV=test node ./out/server/index.mjs > dev-server.log 2>&1 & wait-port localhost:4010 -t 15000
scripts.start:graphql:gen: npm run build:server && (DEBUG=*:ERROR,*:INFO SERVER_SKIP_DB_CONNECT=1 VITE_GRAPHQL_HTTP_URL=http://localhost:4020/graphql node ./out/server/index.mjs > graphql-gen-server.log 2>&1 & wait-port localhost:4020 -t 15000)
scripts.dev: npm run build:server:w & npm run start:w
scripts.dev:test: npm run build:server:w & NODE_ENV=test npm run start:w
scripts.lint: npm run type-check && npm run eslint
